ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metros" (
  "metro_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region the metropolitan area is part of */,
  "metro_area_type" TEXT /* Type of metropolitan area (e.g., urban, suburban) */,
  "median_home_price" INTEGER /* Median home price in the metropolitan area */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the metropolitan area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income in the metropolitan area */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the metropolitan area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the metropolitan area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the metropolitan area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in the metropolitan area */,
  "number_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the metropolitan area */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the metropolitan area */,
  "number_of_parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks in the metropolitan area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the metropolitan area */,
  "public_transportation_score" INTEGER /* Public transportation score (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the region is in */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., rural, urban) */,
  "median_home_price" INTEGER /* Median home price in the region */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the region */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income in the region */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in the region */,
  "number_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the region */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the region */,
  "number_of_parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks in the region */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the region */,
  "public_transportation_score" INTEGER /* Public transportation score (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "control_id" TEXT /* Reference to the property */,
  "fmr" INTEGER /* Fair market rent */,
  "ipov" INTEGER /* Income to poverty ratio */,
  "utility" INTEGER /* Utility costs */,
  "other_cost" INTEGER /* Other costs associated with the property */,
  "cost06" INTEGER /* Costs in the year 2006 */,
  "cost08" INTEGER /* Costs in the year 2008 */,
  "cost12" INTEGER /* Costs in the year 2012 */,
  "cost_med" INTEGER /* Median costs */,
  "assisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is part of an assisted housing program */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income generated by the property */,
  "operating_expenses" INTEGER /* Operating expenses of the property */,
  "net_operating_income" INTEGER /* Net operating income (NOI) of the property */,
  "cap_rate" REAL /* Capitalization rate of the property */,
  "cash_flow" INTEGER /* Cash flow from the property */,
  "debt_service" INTEGER /* Debt service on the property */,
  "debt_coverage_ratio" REAL /* Debt coverage ratio of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_economic_factors" (
  "control_id" TEXT /* Reference to the property */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  "lm_med" INTEGER /* Median income adjusted for location */,
  "per" INTEGER /* Percentage of area median income */,
  "zinc2" TEXT /* Zone Improvement Plan code */,
  "zadeq" TEXT /* Air quality district code */,
  "zsmhc" TEXT /* Soil and water conservation district code */,
  "median_education_level" TEXT /* Median education level in the area */,
  "median_household_size" INTEGER /* Median household size in the area */,
  "median_commuting_time" INTEGER /* Median commuting time in the area (in minutes) */,
  "median_property_tax" INTEGER /* Median property tax in the area */,
  "median_insurance_cost" INTEGER /* Median insurance cost in the area */,
  "median_mortgage_rate" REAL /* Median mortgage rate in the area */,
  "median_energy_cost" INTEGER /* Median energy cost in the area */,
  "median_water_cost" INTEGER /* Median water cost in the area */,
  "median_internet_cost" INTEGER /* Median internet cost in the area */,
  "median_healthcare_cost" INTEGER /* Median healthcare cost in the area */,
  "median_childcare_cost" INTEGER /* Median childcare cost in the area */,
  "median_entertainment_cost" INTEGER /* Median entertainment cost in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_details" (
  "control_id" TEXT /* Reference to the property */,
  "bedrms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "built" INTEGER /* Year built */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of property */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Property value */,
  "nunits" INTEGER /* Number of units in the property */,
  "rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "property_features" TEXT /* Features of the property */,
  "property_amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the property */,
  "property_sustainability" TEXT /* Sustainability features of the property */,
  "property_security" TEXT /* Security measures in place */,
  "property_heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "property_cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, financial analyst) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "user_state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "user_zipcode" TEXT /* ZIP code of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a roles table (if roles are managed separately) */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
